subcodes.first_line: Obedience unto the ordinances of the government is binding upon every Bahá'í, else peril shall encompass the entire body [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اطاعت اوامر دولت بر هر بهائی واجب است وگرنه خطر بر همهٴ هیئت
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
